voices.name: Algenib (English, Male)
voices.description: Bundled Chirp HD reference sample — male English voice.
voices.ref_text: Hi there! We're introducing a new feature where I can read ideas and topics aloud with a natural, human-like voice. Before you get started, please take a moment to go over this important information.
